name: Guianese Creole
notes: French Guianese Creole (kriyòl gwiyannen) — a French-lexifier creole. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. The Wikipedia article documents spelling conventions (q→k, x→z, ⟨ch⟩=/ʃ/, no silent h, ⟨ou⟩→⟨w⟩ for [w]) but no full letter → IPA table or phoneme inventory, and the orthography is not fully standardised; nasal vowels and the treatment of ⟨r⟩ in particular need a cited source. Rather than infer a table, this entry carries metadata only until a descriptive grammar is consulted.
